meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Master User Onboarding to Level Up Your SaaS
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Learn to implement professional user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to boost retention and portfolio value.
content.answer_block: Most student projects fail because users abandon them immediately. By integrating a structured, interactive onboarding flow, you transform a 'basic app' into a professional product. Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI and Claude Code to automate the logic, ensuring your users reach their first 'aha!' moment within seconds.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks grinding out CRUD operations and basic auth, but your dashboard sits empty and your users bounce before they even see the value. This isn't a failure of code; it's a failure of narrative. Most developers treat onboarding as an afterthought, but the pros know it’s the bridge between a hobby project and a functional SaaS product.

Today, we stop building 'features' and start building experiences. We are going to deploy an automated, intelligent onboarding flow that guides your users by the hand. With Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding and Claude Code’s architectural precision, you’ll turn your next repository into a portfolio-ready asset that screams competence to future employers.

steps.title: Architecting the User Journey
steps.description: Define the specific steps a user must take to realize value. Focus on the 'first mile' experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user onboarding flow schema that captures: Welcome Modal, Feature Tour, and Profile Completion. Include state management logic for progress tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state store with zustand'

steps.title: Scaffolding the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, responsive UI components for your tour modals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable OnboardingModal component using Tailwind CSS that supports step navigation and progress bars.

steps.title: Implementing Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Highlight core features dynamically to ensure users interact with your app's primary value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook for triggering tooltips based on user interaction with specific DOM elements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create useTooltip hook and integrate into existing dashboard'

steps.title: Persistence and Progress Tracking
steps.description: Save the user's progress so they can resume onboarding if they refresh the page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service function to save onboarding progress to local storage and sync with the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement persistent onboarding state in local storage'

steps.title: Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Verify the flow works seamlessly without blocking the user from the main interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the onboarding flow to ensure state transitions correctly from step 0 to step 3.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate jest tests for onboarding logic'

pro_tips: Never force an onboarding tour; always provide a 'Skip' button to respect the user's intelligence.
Trigger your first onboarding modal only after the user has performed one meaningful action to build momentum.
Use micro-animations to make the UI feel responsive, but keep them under 300ms to avoid 'loading fatigue'.
Track the drop-off rate at each step of your onboarding using a simple analytics event to identify friction points.
Treat onboarding as a continuous experiment; iterate on your copy and flow based on actual user behavior data.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on building an 'Empty State' dashboard that encourages users to create their first data entry, effectively closing the loop on the user acquisition journey.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build experiences that convert. Stop letting your projects die in the repository—apply these patterns to your next build and show the world what you can do. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
